CLogin::ChangeStepImmediate.notes: v61 SERVERLIST_REQUEST/step-change send sub_56261B @0x56261b builds COutPacket(4)@0x562cbd + SendPacket@0x562cd0 with no Encode -> empty body. Surgically spliced (IDB unnamed sub_56261B).

CLogin::OnCheckPasswordResult#AuthLoginF.notes: v61 LOGIN_STATUS head. Surgically spliced (live v61 IDB has no demangled #AuthLoginFailed symbol; body at CLogin::OnCheckPasswordResult @0x5657ce).

CLogin::OnCheckPasswordResult#AuthPerman.notes: v61 LOGIN_STATUS perm-ban arm (resultCode v4==27) of CLogin::OnCheckPasswordResult @0x5657ce: reads only the shared head (result+byte+int) then routes to a dialog (CUtilDlg::YesNo @0x565c5a); no trailing reason/timestamp is decoded. Matches atlas AuthPermanentBan GMS path (byte+byte+GMSint, no trailing bytes). Surgically spliced.

CLogin::OnCheckPasswordResult#AuthTempor.notes: v61 LOGIN_STATUS temp-ban arm (resultCode v4==2) of CLogin::OnCheckPasswordResult @0x5657ce: after the shared head (result+byte+int) reads Value=Decode1(reason)@0x56583f + DecodeBuffer(8)@0x565848 (chatUnblockDate FILETIME). Matches atlas AuthTemporaryBan (byte+byte+GMSint+reason byte+long8). Surgically spliced.

CLogin::OnCheckPinCodeResult#RegisterPin.notes: v61 REGISTER_PIN send built in CLogin::OnCheckPinCodeResult @0x5688ce (v3==1 register arm @0x568b31): COutPacket(10) + Encode1(pinInput flag) then, when the flag is set, EncodeStr(pin). Matches atlas RegisterPin.Encode (WriteBool + conditional WriteAsciiString). Surgically spliced (IDB has no demangled #RegisterPin symbol).

CLogin::OnCheckUserLimitResult.notes: v61 SERVERSTATUS handler sub_56660E @0x56660e reads the 2-byte status word as 2 x Decode1 (@0x566623 status enum, @0x566626 flag), both -> sub_58FF89(status,flag); atlas writes WriteShort(status<256) = [status,0] so flag=0 -- wire-equivalent to the short. Recorded as one Decode2 (same convention as the verified v79 cell). Surgically spliced (IDB unnamed sub_56660E).
